description: Remove large unreachable response.ok block after fetchFromPage in onlyfans-api.ts.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/onlyfans && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Remove dead response.ok block after fetchFromPage in onlyfans-api.ts
userStories.description: In plugins/onlyfans/src/onlyfans-api.ts, the api() function calls fetchFromPage at line 215, then has a large `if (!response.ok)` block (lines 217-231) that classifies HTTP errors into ToolError categories. Since fetchFromPage auto-throws on non-ok responses, this entire block is unreachable dead code. Remove it.
acceptanceCriteria: The `if (!response.ok)` block (lines 217-231 approximately) is removed from onlyfans-api.ts
The code following the dead block (204 check, JSON parsing) remains unchanged
